# Nevada Flu Report — Portable Repository

Self-contained analytics suite that

1. Generates Nevada’s weekly influenza‐surveillance figures & tables  
   (`flu_report` pipeline).  
2. Uploads ESSENCE hospital data to ILINet and downloads QA extracts  
   (`essence_to_ilinet` pipeline).

Everything (Python **and** R) ships **inside** the repo, so you do *not* need

* Administrator rights  
* Anything on your system `PATH`  
* A separate R or Python install  

---

## 1  Folder map

```{text}
nevada-flu-report/
│
├─ run_flu_report.bat              ← one-click Windows launcher
├─ .venv/                          ← Python 3 virtualenv + packages
├─ tools/
│   └─ R-4.4.0/                    ← portable R + CRAN deps
│
├─ src/
│   ├─ flu_report/                 ← weekly report pipeline
│   │   └─ …                       ← (existing)
│   └─ essence_to_ilinet/          ← NEW: ESSENCE → ILINet uploader
│       ├─ __init__.py
│       ├─ main.py                 ← `python -m essence_to_ilinet …`
│       ├─ pipeline.py             ← full workflow logic
│       ├─ facility_map.py         ← hospital-ID lookup table
│       └─ requirements.txt        ← sub-package pins (mirrors root)
│
├─ outputs/    ← ILINet template TXT files (auto)
└─ downloads/  ← QA CSVs & other artifacts (auto)
```


## 2  One-time workstation setup (no admin rights)

### Get the code

```{powershell}
# Option A: download the ZIP release and unzip
# Option B: clone
git clone https://github.com/your-org/nevada-flu-report.git
```

### Set credentials as user environment variables
**You only need to do this once per machine / Windows account**

```{powershell}
#  ESSENCE API
setx ESSENCE_USER "your_essence_username"
setx ESSENCE_PASS "your_essence_password"

#  ILINet web portal
setx ILINET_USER  "your_ilinet_username"
setx ILINET_PASS  "your_ilinet_password"

#  REDCap API (for flu_report pipeline)
setx REDCAP_TOKEN "your_redcap_token"
setx REDCAP_URL   "redcap_url"
```


### Activate the bundled virtualenv
**You only need to do this once per machine / Windows account**
```{powershell}
# Change directory then uncomment the line below to activate the Python virtualenv (one-time setup)
#cd C:\projects\nevada-flu-report
& .\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1
```

### Install Playwright’s browser binaries
**first run only**
```{powershell}
python -m playwright install chromium
```


```{powershell}
setx RSCRIPT "C:\Program Files\R\R-4.5.2\bin\x64\Rscript.exe"
```


## 3  Run the pipelines

### Flu report generation
```{powershell}
.\run_flu_report.bat --year 2026

.\run_pipeline.bat flu --year 2026

.\run_pipeline.bat ilinet --start 28Sep2025 --end 11Oct2025

run_flu_report.bat --year 2025          # or omit --year for current season
```

The batch file

1. Activates .venv/
2. Adds portable R (tools/R-4.4.0/bin/x64) to the session
3. Executes python -m flu_report.main …

Products land in downloads\YEAR\ (figures, tables, PDF).

### ESSENCE → ILINet uploader
```{powershell}
python -m essence_to_ilinet `
       --start 10Aug2025 `
       --end   28Feb2026 `
       --facilities "geography=16435&geography=16436&…"   # optional; default is demo single site
```

What happens:

1. Downloads ESSENCE CSV for the date range & facilities
2. Builds ILINet TXT template in outputs/ESSENCE_ILINet_YYYY-MM-DD.txt
3. Logs into ILINet, uploads the TXT, downloads ILI & Lab QA CSVs
4. Saves QA files to downloads/ with today’s date in the filename

## Updating tools (maintainers)

### Portable R
1. Replace tools/R-* with a newer portable ZIP.
2. Edit the hard-coded path in run_flu_report.bat **and**
src/flu_report/utils.py (LOCAL_R constant).

### Python dependencies
```{powershell}
& .\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1
pip install -U -r requirements.txt
python -m playwright install chromium   # rerun if Playwright version changed
deactivate
```

## Troubleshooting

Symptom	// Fix Cause

* Rscript not found // Always run via run_flu_report.bat
* Playwright says “browser executable not found” // Forgot python -m playwright install chromium
* SSL / proxy errors // Run on a network that allows HTTPS to CDC / NSSP
* “Permission denied” writing to downloads // Close any Excel/Explorer window using the file
* Need to re-run ESSENCE uploader for another wk // Change --start/--end dates and rerun
